contents.value: **@model** — Razor keyword.
**@page** — Razor keyword.
**@section** — Razor keyword.
**@using** — Razor keyword.
**@inject** — Razor keyword.
**Html.Raw** — Built-in function/command in Razor.
**Html.Partial** — Built-in function/command in Razor.
**Html.RenderPartial** — Built-in function/command in Razor.
**Html.ActionLink** — Built-in function/command in Razor.
**Html.BeginForm** — Built-in function/command in Razor.
A **class** is a reference type that encapsulates data and behavior.
A **struct** is a value type suitable for small data structures.
An **interface** defines a contract that implementing types must follow.

A **delegate** is a type-safe function pointer.
```csharp
delegate void Handler(string msg);
```
An **event** enables a class to notify subscribers when something occurs.
**async** marks a method as asynchronous, allowing use of **await**.
**await** suspends execution until an asynchronous operation completes.

**LINQ** provides query syntax for collections.
```csharp
var result = from x in list where x > 0 select x;
```

A **property** provides controlled access to a field.
```csharp
public int Age { get; set; }
```
A **namespace** organizes types and prevents naming conflicts.

**Nullable types** can represent the normal range of values plus null.
```csharp
int? x = null; string? s = null;
```

A **record** is an immutable reference type with value-based equality.
```csharp
record Person(string Name, int Age);
```

**Generics** create type-safe reusable components.
```csharp
public class Box<T> { public T Value { get; set; } }
```

```razor
ViewBag.PropertyName -> dynamic
```
A dynamic property bag for passing data from controllers to views without strong typing. Uses C# dynamic dispatch so properties are resolved at runtime with no compile-time type checking.

```razor
ViewData["key"] -> object
```
A dictionary-based mechanism for passing data from controllers to views using string keys. Values are typed as object and require casting. ViewBag is a dynamic wrapper around ViewData.

```razor
TempData["key"] -> object
```
A short-lived dictionary for passing data between two consecutive requests, typically used for redirect-based status messages. Data persists through one subsequent request then is automatically deleted.

```razor
Url.Action(actionName, controllerName, routeValues) -> string
```
Generates a URL string for the specified controller action using the application routing configuration. Returns a properly encoded URL without creating a full anchor element.

```razor
Url.Content(contentPath) -> string
```
Converts a virtual application-relative path starting with tilde to an absolute path, resolving the application root for referencing static files like CSS, JavaScript, and images.

```razor
RenderSection(name, required) -> IHtmlContent
```
Renders the content of a named section defined in a child view within the layout page. The required parameter controls whether views must define the section or can omit it.

```razor
RenderBody() -> IHtmlContent
```
Renders the main content of a child view within the layout page at the location where RenderBody is called. Every layout page must include exactly one call to RenderBody.

```razor
String
```
Text data type representing a sequence of characters.

```razor
Number
```
Numeric data type for integer and floating-point values.

```razor
Boolean
```
Logical type with two values: true and false.

```razor
Array
```
Ordered collection of elements accessible by index.

```razor
Object
```
Collection of key-value pairs (properties and methods).

```razor
null
```
Represents the intentional absence of any value.
